title: Crispy Moroccan Pudding Crumble
description: A sweet Moroccan dessert that combines crispy crumble topping with rich pudding and exotic spices.

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: chilled and cut into small pieces

instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and moroccan spice blend.
Add cold butter to the dry ingredients and use a pastry blender to work it into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Stir in crumbly oat topping and black sesame seeds.
In a large bowl, whisk together pudding mix and whole milk.
Add egg and vanilla extract to the pudding mixture and whisk until smooth.
Pour the pudding mixture into individual serving cups or a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Top the pudding with the crumbly oat mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the pudding is set.
Serve warm or chilled, garnished with additional black sesame seeds if desired.
